SEARCH

Uses of Package
com.mimecast.robin.config.server

Packages that use com.mimecast.robin.config.server
Package
Description
com.mimecast.robin.config.server
Server-specific configuration files and their accessors.
com.mimecast.robin.endpoints
HTTP endpoints for service monitoring and metrics.
com.mimecast.robin.main
The entry point and core components of the Robin application.
com.mimecast.robin.queue.relay
Relaying of emails from the persistent queue.
com.mimecast.robin.scanners
Deals with scanning emails for SPAM, viruses and other potential threats.
com.mimecast.robin.smtp
The heart of the Robin application, providing core SMTP client and server functionalities.
com.mimecast.robin.smtp.connection
SMTP connection management with security policy enforcement.
com.mimecast.robin.smtp.extension.server
Server-side implementations of SMTP extensions.
com.mimecast.robin.smtp.security
SMTP security components including TLS, DANE, and MTA-STS support.
com.mimecast.robin.smtp.session
Contains everything related to the management of SMTP sessions.
com.mimecast.robin.smtp.webhook
Manages the sending of SMTP-related events to webhook endpoints.
com.mimecast.robin.storage
Manages the storage of incoming emails for the server.
com.mimecast.robin.util
A collection of miscellaneous utility classes used throughout the Robin application.
  • Classes in com.mimecast.robin.config.server used by com.mimecast.robin.config.server
    Class
    Description
    AdaptiveRateConfig
    Configuration for adaptive rate limiting.
    BlackholeConfig
    Configuration class for blackhole settings.
    BlocklistConfig
    Configuration class for connection blocklist settings.
    BotConfig
    Bot configuration for email infrastructure analysis bots.
    BotConfig.BotDefinition
    Represents a single bot definition.
    DistributedRateConfig
    Configuration for distributed rate limiting via Redis.
    EndpointConfig
    Endpoint authentication configuration.
    GeoIpConfig
    Configuration class for GeoIP-based connection filtering.
    IpPoolConfig
    IP pool configuration.
    IpPoolConfig.AddressEntry
    A bind address with an associated selection weight.
    IpPoolConfig.PoolEntry
    An IP pool with a name, default flag, and address list.
    ListenerConfig
    Listener configuration for SMTP ports.
    ProxyConfig
    Configuration class for proxy settings.
    ProxyRule
    Represents a single proxy rule configuration.
    RblConfig
    Configuration class for RBL (Realtime Blackhole List) settings.
    RspamdConfig
    Rspamd configuration.
    RspamdConfig.DkimSigningConfig
    DKIM signing SQL lookup configuration.
    ScenarioConfig
    Server scenario configuration container.
    UserConfig
    Server user configuration container.
    UsersConfig
    Users configuration.
    VaultConfig
    Vault configuration.
    WebhookConfig
    Webhook configuration.
    WhitelistConfig
    Configuration class for connection whitelist settings.
